overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking along a sunlit urban sidewalk in Los Santos. The character passes by the 'SPITROASTERS' restaurant, various pedestrians, and light city traffic on a clear summer day.

events.description: pedestrian in striped dress walks toward and passes by the camera on the right
slight path adjustment to navigate around oncoming pedestrian

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past the restaurant outdoor seating area

notable_agents.action: woman in white and black striped dress walking toward the camera
red and yellow delivery truck moving along the street

entered.detail: corner restaurant with red awning, outdoor seating, and 'SPITROASTERS' signage
tall palm tree on the sidewalk median
metal traffic signal pole at the intersection
green painted bench along the restaurant front

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a walk along a sunlit urban sidewalk in GTA V, passing the SPITROASTERS restaurant with its distinctive red awning. The camera moves forward at walking pace, passing a woman in a striped dress walking in the opposite direction, while a delivery truck moves along the adjacent street.

events.description: stationary pedestrian comes into view standing on the right side of the sidewalk
passing close by the stationary pedestrian who is eating near the corner

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk toward the intersection, passing a stationary pedestrian

notable_agents.action: man in dark clothing standing and eating food near the street corner
man in gray jacket walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: white multi-story residential building visible behind the restaurant

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking toward the street corner, passing the end of the SPITROASTERS building. A man stands near the corner eating, and the view opens up to show more of the intersection and a white building in the background. The camera passes the green bench and approaches the corner where the sidewalk meets the cross street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a sunlit urban sidewalk that gradually opens from a storefront view into a wider city intersection. It begins by passing the red awning of the SPITROASTERS restaurant, moving past a woman in a striped dress while a delivery truck travels along the adjacent street. As the camera continues forward, the view shifts away from the restaurant building toward the street corner, passing a man eating near the edge of the sidewalk. The scene then expands to reveal a white building in the background and a green bench before finally reaching the point where the sidewalk meets the cross street.
